Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Class ChoiceExpr

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.ChoiceExpr
public abstract class ChoiceExpr extends Object
A ChoiceExpr is a boolean expression that determines whether a taclet or a goal should be activated. ChoiceExpr are built over and, or, or not. Its atoms are choices (category:option).

This class provides factory methods for constructing an AST.

      public abstract boolean eval(@NonNull Set<Choice> current)
      Evaluate the expression to a boolean value given the current activated choices.
      Parameters:
      current - activated choices
      Returns:
      true if the expr is true given the assignment in current
